User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the PowerHub CRS platform.

role.description: The user's role within the platform (e.g., Resident, Seller, Service Provider, Driver).

rating.description: User rating, if applicable (e.g., for service providers).

profileImageUrl.description: URL of the user's profile image.

location.description: The user's current location, useful for proximity based services.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Represents a report submitted by a user regarding an issue (e.g., power outage, flood).

category.description: Category of the report (e.g., power, flood, waste).

coords.description: Geographical coordinates of the reported issue.

media.description: URL of the attached media (image, video) for the report.

status.description: Status of the report (e.g., pending, in progress, resolved).

upvotes.description: Number of upvotes the report has received.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the report was created.

description.description: Additional details provided by the user, such as the location or time of the incident.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a service offered by a user (e.g., AgroConnect, SkillsHub, LaundryHub).

category.description: Category of the service (e.g., AgroConnect, SkillsHub).

location.description: Location where the service is offered.

contact.description: Contact information for the service provider.

description.description: A description of the service offered.

Area.title: Area
Area.description: Represents an area and its aggregated stats (e.g., power status, flood score, waste score).

powerStatus.description: Status of power in the area (e.g., ON, OFF).

floodScore.description: Flood risk score for the area.

wasteScore.description: Waste overflow score for the area.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a transaction (e.g., bookings, pickups) between users and service providers.

userId.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Transaction) User initiating the transaction (e.g., booking a service).

serviceId.description: Reference to Service. (Relationship: Service 1:N Transaction) The service that is being transacted.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the transaction occurred.

status.description: Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled).

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. Only the user can access their own data.

/reports/{reportId}.description: Stores reports submitted by users. Publicly readable, write-protected to authenticated users.

/services/{serviceId}.description: Stores service listings offered by users. Only the service owner can edit or delete their services.

/areas/{areaId}.description: Stores aggregated stats for different areas. Publicly readable.

/transactions/{transactionId}.description: Stores transactions between users and service providers.
